label: should_pass

submission.name: EVAL Subject Line A/B Variants
submission.tagline: Generate 4 email subject-line variants for A/B testing.
submission.description: MarOps provides the campaign's core message + audience. Tool returns a table of 4 variants with the angle (curiosity, benefit, question, social-proof).
submission.system_prompt: You write 4 email-subject-line variants. Return a markdown table: Angle | Subject | Character Count. Angles in this exact order: curiosity, benefit, question, social-proof. Each subject <= 50 characters. Do not use all-caps, emoji, or 'RE:'/'FWD:' spoofing. Campaign message: {{message}}. Audience: {{audience}}.

notes: Structured output with explicit formatting rules. Should pass QA cleanly.
